_meta.author: Claude (national autopilot)
_meta.note: Federal House batch — NY-21 (open, Stefanik retiring from Congress 12/19/2025) + PA-03 (open, Evans retiring). Evidence-first finalization of 2026 open-seat challengers via campaign sites / questionnaires / press (no roll-call records). CANDIDACY CURRENCY CATCHES: caruso switched NY-21->NY Assembly 113 (2026-02-18, not_running NY-21); hewitt WITHDREW 2026-03-27 (not_running); isaiah-t-martin-iii (PA-03, Isaiah T. Martin III 'Xeyah') dropped before the 5/19/2026 primary, Chris Rabb won the nomination -> status lost (and guarded against misattribution to the separate Texas Isaiah Martin, TX-18 / isaiahmartin.org / FEC H4TX18153). gendebien (active frontrunner) + amoriell (active underdog) scored on cited self-statements; amoriell carries a pro-gun 'without bans' cross-party deviation -> documented credit.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-21 (filed 2026; WITHDREW — switched to NY State Assembly District 113 on 2026-02-18)

profile.background: Saratoga-area small-business owner (SUNY Plattsburgh business degree). Filed a federal NY-21 committee 'Caruso for Congress' (Statement of Candidacy 2026-01-30, FEC H6NY21264) but on 2026-02-18 announced a switch to the NY State Assembly District 113 race (challenging Dem incumbent Carrie Woerner); now runs carusoforassembly.com. Not a factor in the NY-21 GOP primary (framed as Constantino vs. Smullen).

allen-caruso.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, federal tier] CANDIDACY CURRENCY: Caruso withdrew from the NY-21 congressional race and switched to the NY State Assembly District 113 race on 2026-02-18 (carusoforassembly.com; poststar.com 2026-02-18; nystateofpolitics.com 2026-02-18). NY-21 is genuinely open for 2026 — Elise Stefanik dropped her NY governor bid AND declined House reelection on 2026-... (NBC 12/19/2025); the GOP primary (6/23/2026) is Anthony Constantino (Trump-endorsed) vs. Robert Smullen (NY GOP-endorsed). His only published platform is the Assembly campaign: economics-only (affordability, small business, public safety, rural healthcare) with NO social-issue content. No life/marriage/guns/faith/immigration/election positions findable -> all cells null; scored nothing fabricated. Status set not_running for NY-21.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-21 (2026 D candidate · open seat · dairy farmer · primary 6/23/2026)

profile.background: Second-generation St. Lawrence County dairy farmer (Twin Mill Farms, Lisbon). Democratic frontrunner for the open NY-21 seat in 2026 — endorsed by all 15 county Democratic chairs, ~$4.7M raised; self-describes as a 'conservative, blue dog Democrat.' Stayed in for the 2026 regular election after Stefanik's UN nomination was pulled; contested June 23, 2026 primary vs. Stuart Amoriell.

blake-gendebien.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, federal tier] ACTIVE frontrunner for the open NY-21 seat (primary 6/23/2026 vs. Amoriell). Scored from his campaign Issues page + WAMC questionnaire (no roll-call record). PRO-CHOICE (HARD): 'protect a woman's right to choose and oppose... total abortion bans even in cases of rape' -> sanctity_of_life q0 FALSE. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION (border): blue-dog enforcement-leaning language — 'deport criminal immigrants,' 'secure the border,' make it 'harder to enter our country illegally, but easier to enter legally' + ag guest-worker track; he does NOT support mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens (favors a legal/guest-worker pathway) -> border q1 FALSE on the hardline, deviation noted. Guns: self-described gun owner who 'supports the Second Amendment' but backs universal background checks + safe-storage (SOFT/mixed, no clear rubric-cell position) -> null. Dairy-farmer ag platform (cut farm regulation, young-farmer support, whole milk in schools) and 'never cut Social Security/Medicare/Medicaid' are not rubric cells -> null. No marriage/family/faith/election/foreign positions found -> null. No single-issue-group (PP/EMILY's List/NRA/SBA) endorsement confirmed.

0.note: Campaign Issues page: 'protect a woman's right to choose and oppose new regulations that put in place total abortion bans even in cases of rape' — pro-choice, does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Supports a legal/guest-worker pathway ('easier to enter legally,' year-round ag guest-worker program) and deporting only 'criminal immigrants' — does NOT support mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens. (Blue-dog enforcement lean noted as a cross-party deviation, but below the rubric's deport-all bar.)

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-21 (2026 D candidate · WITHDREW/suspended 2026-03-27)

profile.background: 33-year-old former White House trade official from South Glens Falls (Warren County). Entered the NY-21 Democratic primary in Sept 2025; Working Families Party-endorsed; suspended his campaign on 2026-03-27 after failing to win county-party endorsements (which went to frontrunner Gendebien).

dylan-hewitt-ny-21.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, federal tier] CANDIDACY CURRENCY: Hewitt SUSPENDED his NY-21 campaign on 2026-03-27 ('campaigns are expensive... run on money and access'); he will NOT appear on the 6/23/2026 ballot (NCPR 2026-03-27; CBS6 Albany; AOL/USA Today). Status set not_running. Thin, uniformly progressive record while active: NY Working Families Party endorsement (2026-02-18, HARD progressive signal), 'the only candidate in NY-21 who supports Medicare For All,' anti-monopoly populism, and pro-immigrant — 'defending immigrant communities from federal attacks,' would 'hold the line against Kristi Noem's masked agents' -> opposite of the enforcement rubric (border q1 FALSE). No life/marriage/faith/election/2A/foreign positions found -> null. No conservative deviation.

1.note: Campaigned on 'defending immigrant communities from federal attacks' and pledged to 'hold the line against Kristi Noem's masked agents' — opposes federal deportation enforcement; contrary to mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-21 (2026 D candidate · open seat · Lake Placid business owner · primary 6/23/2026)

profile.religion: Lifelong Catholic (self-described); personally opposes abortion but opposes government restriction
profile.background: Lake Placid restaurateur (owner of The Pickled Pig), self-styled 'Independent Democrat' running a progressive underdog primary campaign for the open NY-21 seat against frontrunner Blake Gendebien (primary 6/23/2026). Entered the race after ICE detained a legally-authorized Venezuelan employee.

stuart-amoriell.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, federal tier] ACTIVE underdog for the open NY-21 seat (primary 6/23/2026). Scored from amoriell.com/issues + interviews. Uniformly progressive on culture: PRO-CHOICE ('the government cannot replace this deeply individual decision') -> sanctity q0 FALSE; supports the EQUALITY ACT and 'the government has no role... in matters of who we choose to love' -> biblical_marriage q0/q1/q4 FALSE; 'Abolish & Replace ICE' + legal-pathway/farm-worker visas -> border q1/q2 FALSE; tax-the-wealthy + Medicare for All (not rubric cells) -> null. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION (guns): unusually firearm-friendly for a progressive — 'the rights of law-abiding Americans to own firearms must be protected,' explicitly 'without bans' -> self_defense q1 TRUE (documented opposition to 'assault weapons' bans; genuine credit per the give-credit-where-earned rule). Foreign policy non-interventionist lean (opposed unilateral Iran/Venezuela strikes) framed around international cooperation, not Article I -> null. No single-issue-group endorsement found.

0.note: Pro-choice: 'the government cannot replace this deeply individual decision'; opposes government restriction on abortion (personally Catholic/opposed). Does not affirm personhood from conception.
'The government has no role, no right, and no authority in matters of who we choose to love' — does not affirm marriage as one man and one woman.

1.note: Backs the federal Equality Act; supports same-sex marriage.

4.note: Supports the Equality Act — promotion of LGBTQ+ identity protections in federal policy.

1.note: Calls to 'Abolish & Replace ICE'; wants a legal pathway to citizenship and expanded farm-worker visas — opposes mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens.

2.note: Pro-immigrant / 'Abolish & Replace ICE' posture — opposite of opposing sanctuary policies and federal preemption against them.

1.note: Cross-party deviation: 'the rights of law-abiding Americans to own firearms must be protected,' supports safety measures 'without bans' — documented opposition to 'assault weapons' bans. Credit given per the give-credit-where-earned rule.

set.office: U.S. Representative PA-03 (2026 D candidate · open seat · did NOT make the ballot; Chris Rabb won the 5/19/2026 nomination)

profile.background: Isaiah T. Martin III ('Xeyah'), Philadelphia real-estate developer / executive director of Empowered CDC. Declared for the open PA-03 seat (Dwight Evans retiring) on 2025-11-09 in a crowded field, but did not advance; the 2026 Democratic nominee is Chris Rabb (won ~44% on 2026-05-19). NOTE: a DIFFERENT, more prominent Isaiah Martin ran in Texas (TX-18, isaiahmartin.org, FEC H4TX18153) — do not conflate; the detailed positions circulating online belong to the Texas candidate.

isaiah-t-martin-iii.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, federal tier] CANDIDACY CURRENCY: PA-03 Isaiah T. Martin III declared 2025-11-09 but did NOT make the final field/ballot; Chris Rabb won the PA-03 Democratic nomination on 2026-05-19. Status set lost. PA-03 is genuinely open (Rep. Dwight Evans announced 2025-06-30 he will not seek reelection). MISATTRIBUTION GUARD: his PA-03 campaign messaging was generic only (affordable housing, jobs, safer neighborhoods, education reform) — NO documented stance on life/marriage/family/faith/economy/elections/border/guns/foreign/industry. Any detailed progressive positions found online (abortion codification, pathway-to-citizenship, etc.) trace to the SEPARATE Texas Isaiah Martin (isaiahmartin.org / FEC H4TX18153) and must NOT be imported here. All cells null; scored nothing fabricated.
